scripts.build:ci: node scripts/prepare-ci-environment.mjs && ng build --configuration=ci && node copy-proxy-server.js
scripts.build:android:prod: node scripts/build-mobile.js android && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:android:dev: node scripts/build-mobile.js androiddev && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:ios:prod: node scripts/build-mobile.js ios && npx cap sync ios
scripts.build:ios:dev: node scripts/build-mobile.js iosdev && npx cap sync ios
scripts.build:mobile:prod: node scripts/build-mobile.js ios && npx cap sync ios && node scripts/build-mobile.js android && npx cap sync android
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:build && npm run test:emulator && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:visual
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:unit && npm run lint && npm run test:build && npm --prefix functions run build && npm run test:emulator:spot-edits && npm run emulators:test:community && npm run test:e2e -- --project=chromium && npm run test:visual -- --project=chromium
scripts.test:prepush: npm run test:unit && npm run build:dev && npm run test:emulator
scripts.test:perf: npm run test:perf:map && npm run test:lighthouse
scripts.test:emulator: npm run test:emulator:rules && npm run test:emulator:event-rsvp && npm run test:emulator:auth && npm run test:emulator:storage && npm run test:emulator:storage-images && npm run test:emulator:user-flows && npm run test:emulator:spot-edits && npm run emulators:test:community
scripts.test:emulator:event-rsvp: npm --prefix functions run build && node scripts/run_firebase_with_local_java.js emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions --project demo-pkspot "vitest run src/app/services/firebase/firestore/events.service.emulator.spec.ts"
scripts.test:emulator:auth: node scripts/run_firebase_with_local_java.js emulators:exec --only auth,firestore --project demo-pkspot "node scripts/emulator_run_auth_flow.js"
scripts.test:emulator:storage-images: npm --prefix functions run build && node scripts/run_firebase_with_local_java.js emulators:exec --only firestore,storage,functions --project demo-pkspot "node scripts/emulator_run_storage_image_processing_flow.js"
scripts.test:emulator:user-flows: npm --prefix functions run build && node scripts/run_firebase_with_local_java.js emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions --project demo-pkspot "node scripts/emulator_run_spot_create_user_flow.js"
scripts.emulators:test:community: npm --prefix functions run build && node scripts/run_firebase_with_local_java.js emulators:exec --only firestore,functions --project demo-pkspot "node scripts/emulator_run_community_flow.js"
scripts.test:emulator:spot-edits: npm --prefix functions run build && node scripts/run_firebase_with_local_java.js emulators:exec --only firestore,functions --project demo-pkspot "node scripts/emulator_run_spot_edit_flow.js"
scripts.deploy:test:rules: npx firebase use test && npx firebase deploy --only firestore:rules
scripts.deploy:prod:rules: npx firebase use prod && npx firebase deploy --only firestore:rules
scripts.deploy:functions: cd ./functions && npm run build && npx firebase deploy --only functions && cd ..
scripts.deploy:test:functions: npx firebase use test && cd ./functions && npm run build && npx firebase deploy --only functions && cd ..
scripts.deploy:prod:functions: npx firebase use prod && cd ./functions && npm run build && npx firebase deploy --only functions && cd ..
